summary: Verified both bug fixes are working correctly. Bug Fix 1: 'Editar' button in 'Predios Nuevos' > 'Mis Creaciones' navigates to /dashboard/predios?predio_nuevo={id} and opens the edit modal with pre-filled data. Bug Fix 2: 'Rechazar' button for gestor de apoyo is present and opens a confirmation modal requiring observaciones.

console_errors.error: 403 errors on /api/predios/cambios/pendientes and /api/predios/reapariciones for gestor role
console_errors.impact: Low - Expected behavior for permission-based endpoints

console_errors.error: Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent
console_errors.impact: Accessibility warning, not a functional issue

bug_fix_1_editar_button_mis_creaciones.description: 'Editar' button in 'Predios Nuevos' > 'Mis Creaciones' navigates correctly to edit page

test_results.button_present: PASSED - Button with data-testid='edit-predio-{id}' is present
test_results.modal_opens: PASSED - Edit modal opens with predio data pre-filled
test_results.data_loaded: PASSED - Código predial nacional and other fields are loaded

bug_fix_1_editar_button_mis_creaciones.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Nuevo Predio - San Calixto' modal with pre-filled data

bug_fix_2_rechazar_button_gestor_apoyo.description: 'Rechazar' button for gestor de apoyo opens confirmation modal with required observaciones

test_results.button_present: PASSED - Button with data-testid='rechazar-asignacion-{id}' is present
test_results.modal_opens: PASSED - 'Rechazar Asignación' modal opens on click
test_results.observaciones_required: PASSED - Observaciones textarea is present and required
test_results.modal_content: PASSED - Shows predio details and explanation text

bug_fix_2_rechazar_button_gestor_apoyo.evidence: Screenshot shows modal with 'El predio será devuelto al gestor creador. Ya no aparecerá en tus asignaciones.'

backend_rechazar_asignacion_endpoint.description: POST /api/predios-nuevos/{id}/accion with accion='rechazar_asignacion' is handled correctly

test_results.endpoint_exists: PASSED - Returns 404 for non-existent predio (not 400 invalid action)
test_results.action_recognized: PASSED - 'rechazar_asignacion' is in the list of valid actions
test_results.permission_check: PASSED - Only gestor_apoyo_id can reject assignment

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Bug Fix 1: Frontend Pendientes.js lines 1177-1189 correctly show 'Editar' button for gestor de apoyo or coordinador in editable states
✓ Bug Fix 2: Frontend Pendientes.js lines 1191-1205 correctly show 'Rechazar' button for gestor de apoyo in pending states
✓ Backend server.py lines 10677-10686 correctly handle 'rechazar_asignacion' action - removes gestor_apoyo_id and sets estado to 'creado'
Note: Accessibility warning for DialogContent missing aria-describedby - minor issue
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing predios nuevos for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working: 1) 'Editar' button in Mis Creaciones navigates to /dashboard/predios?predio_nuevo={id} and opens edit modal with data. 2) 'Rechazar' button for gestor de apoyo opens modal requiring observaciones and calls rechazar_asignacion action. The admin user (catastro@asomunicipios.gov.co) has predios in both 'Asignados a Mí' and 'Mis Creaciones' tabs for testing. The gestor.apoyo@test.com user currently has no assigned predios.
